task_completion.description: Verify the payment gateway is being created using the Manual plugin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Drupal Commerce 'Add payment gateway' configuration screen where the 'Plugin' radio button or dropdown is set to 'Manual'.

task_completion.description: Verify the payment gateway name is set to 'Bank Transfer'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' text field contains exactly 'Bank Transfer'.

task_completion.description: Verify the display label is set to 'Bank Wire Transfer'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Display label' text field contains exactly 'Bank Wire Transfer'.

task_completion.description: Verify the mode is set to Live and the status is Enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Mode' selection (often radio buttons) is set to 'Live' (not 'Test'), and the 'Status' checkbox or toggle is checked/active.

task_completion.description: Verify the payment instructions match the required text exactly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Payment instructions' text area contains the exact required text, including 'Bank: First National Bank', 'Account Name: Urban Electronics LLC', 'Account Number: 7890123456', 'Routing Number: 021000021', and 'Reference: Your order number'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Drupal Commerce web interface to configure the payment gateway.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Drupal admin web interface in a web browser, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Drupal application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows a valid Drupal admin path (e.g., /admin/commerce/config/payment-gateways) and the interface matches standard Drupal Commerce styling, not a text editor or mock page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client or terminal to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows, phpMyAdmin, or database command line interfaces in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected plugin type is 'manual'. The gateway name must be 'Bank Transfer' with a display label of 'Bank Wire Transfer'. The mode must be 'live'. The payment instructions must include the exact account number '7890123456' and routing number '021000021' as specified in the task description, even if the routing number corresponds to a different real-world bank (this is synthetic test data).
